name: flashcapsule
description: 闪记胶囊 - 记录灵感、管理收支、倒计时提醒的全能App

scripts.build: echo 'Static web app, no build step needed'
scripts.cap:init: npx cap init 闪记胶囊 com.flashcapsule.app --web-dir=.
scripts.cap:build:android: npx cap sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.cap:apk: npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
